name: jetbrains-project-launcher
title: JetBrains Project Launcher
description: Search and open recent JetBrains projects across IDEs and versions.
author: davidseptimus

commands.name: search-projects
commands.title: Search Projects
commands.description: Search recent, project-root, and worktree JetBrains projects

commands.name: rerun-last-task
commands.title: Rerun Last Task
commands.description: Re-run the most recently run build-system task

preferences.name: excludeWorktrees
preferences.title: Exclude Git Worktrees
preferences.description: Hide linked git worktrees from the Recent source. Worktrees still appear under the Worktrees source.
preferences.label: Hide worktrees from recent projects

preferences.name: terminal
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: Terminal for the Open in Terminal action.

preferences.name: customOpenCommand
preferences.title: Custom Open Command
preferences.description: Command for the custom open action, for example: code {path}

preferences.name: taskTerminal
preferences.title: Task Terminal
preferences.description: Terminal the task runner launches into.

preferences.name: taskWindow
preferences.title: Task Window
preferences.description: Run tasks in a new terminal window by default.
preferences.label: Open tasks in a new window

preferences.name: customTaskTerminalCommand
preferences.title: Custom Task Terminal Command
preferences.description: Template that launches tasks in any terminal. Supports {cmd}, {cwd}, and {name}.

preferences.name: disabledTaskRunners
preferences.title: Disable Task Runners
preferences.description: Comma-separated task runners to skip, such as gradle,npm,make.

preferences.name: ignoreContent
preferences.title: Ignore Content
preferences.description: Comma-separated entry-name globs treated as non-content.

preferences.name: ignoreProjects
preferences.title: Ignore Projects
preferences.description: Comma-separated globs matched against project names and paths.

preferences.name: configRoots
preferences.title: Config Roots
preferences.description: Colon-separated dirs holding JetBrains and Google IDE config dirs.

preferences.name: appRoots
preferences.title: Application Folders
preferences.description: Colon-separated folders scanned for JetBrains .app bundles.

preferences.name: projectRoots
preferences.title: Project Roots
preferences.description: Colon-separated dirs whose immediate subfolders are offered by the Projects source. Empty auto-detects conventional JetBrains folders.

preferences.name: toolboxDirs
preferences.title: Toolbox Script Dirs
preferences.description: Colon-separated dirs holding JetBrains Toolbox launcher scripts.
